description: OpenZeppelin's Hardhat 3 migration branch (PR #6542) including their Mocha test suite.

reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/utils/Base58.t.sol test/governance/extensions/GovernorSuperQuorumGreaterThanQuorum.t.sol contracts/utils/math/Math.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/utils/Base58.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/governance/extensions/GovernorSuperQuorumGreaterThanQuorum.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: contra.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> contracts/utils/math/Math.sol && npx hardhat compile
